global.description: The ad features a vibrant design promoting the game VoxelRealm with engaging text and icons.
global.main_message: Join the arena and play with friends tonight.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: VoxelRealm logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'VoxelRealm' in bold, prominent letters at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four circular game icons arranged in a grid, each with a simple design and a light background.

elements.label: Join the arena text
elements.description: A bold, inviting text that reads 'Join the arena' in a large font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Play with friends text
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message that says 'Play with friends tonight', encouraging social interaction.

elements.label: Game controls
elements.description: Two circular buttons representing game controls, placed at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Next arrow
elements.description: A right-facing arrow icon indicating progression or next steps, located at the top right.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Watch now', designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Geometric shapes in the background, adding depth and visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small, circular icon that is not clearly defined, placed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: Another small, circular icon similar to the previous one, located near the center.

elements.label: Top small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon at the top of the ad, not clearly defined.

elements.label: Top small icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon at the top, similar to the previous one.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline text 'VoxelRealm' is large and bold, capturing immediate attention.

elements.label: Secondary message
elements.description: A secondary message that invites users to play with friends, positioned centrally.
elements.text_content: Join the arena Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button at the bottom of the ad encouraging viewers to engage.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, playful and colorful, VoxelRealm logo, engaging text.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by game icons, body text in the center, and a CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VoxelRealm, Join the arena, Play with friends tonight, Watch now
